topics.label: Setup (Racket/Guile/Chez)
topics.description: Install a Scheme implementation. Racket includes a full IDE.

topics.label: S-expressions & Prefix Notation
topics.description: Everything is a list: (function arg1 arg2). Code is data.

topics.label: Define & Lambda
topics.description: define for bindings, lambda for anonymous functions. Functions are first-class.

topics.label: Lists & Pairs
topics.description: cons, car, cdr, list. Pairs are the building blocks of all data structures.

topics.label: Recursion
topics.description: No loops — recursion and tail recursion handle all iteration.

topics.label: Higher-Order Functions
topics.description: map, filter, fold, apply. Pass and return functions freely.

topics.label: Let & Closures
topics.description: let, let*, letrec for local bindings. Closures capture their environment.

topics.label: Macros (syntax-rules)
topics.description: Hygienic macros for code transformation. Scheme macros are safe by default.

topics.label: Continuations (call/cc)
topics.description: First-class continuations for advanced control flow. Scheme's unique feature.

topics.label: I/O & Ports
topics.description: Read from and write to ports (files, stdin/stdout).
